repo_prior_art.cite: pid_offline_policy_joint_misspec_v1: joint offline-policy misspecification with a mean-side outcome tube, though not this scalar MSM-interval intersection benchmark

published_prior_art.cite: YadlowskyNamkoongBasuDuchiTian2022 and ZhangXuTan2025: mean-side MSM/eMSM bounds, not the fixed offline-policy mean-versus-quantile benchmark

repo_prior_art.cite: pid_offline_policy_joint_misspec_v1 and failed pid_qte_marginal_sensitivity_v1 discuss joint compatibility or quantile-process issues, but not this fixed-center offline-policy conditional-quantile-tube endpoint

published_prior_art.cite: HessFrauenMelnychukFeuerriegel2026 gives MSM-only sharp off-policy value; DornGuo2023 gives bounded-weight quantile geometry; ZhangXuTan2025deMSM, MastenPoirierRen2025, and Wang2026 are close distributional-sensitivity comparators but do not subsume this fixed-center policy-value tube

repo_prior_art.cite: pid_offline_policy_joint_misspec_v1: non-rectangular diagnostic for joint misspecification, but not the quantile-envelope representability criterion

published_prior_art.cite: none; the verified MSM/off-policy/distributional-sensitivity papers do not state this Delta_rect equality-versus-strictness criterion for the fixed-center quantile tube

HessFrauenMelnychukFeuerriegel2026 supplies the MSM-only one-step score; Firpo2007 and ChernozhukovEtAl2018 supply inverse-CDF and DML templates; Wang2026 gives close nonsmooth quantile-envelope inference, but not this coupled contact-face correction

novelty_flags.label: drafter handoff / comparator promise table
novelty_flags.one_line: The prose names Hess/Frauen and other published comparators as extensions or corrections, but the required comparator-promise table is missing, so the exact strict-tightening promises are not auditable statement-by-statement.

novelty_flags.label: related_work / distributional quantile-sensitivity comparators
novelty_flags.one_line: The survey omits MastenPoirierRen2025 and Wang2026, which are closer published threats for sharp QTE/DTE or nested quantile-envelope sensitivity than the older generic quantile references.

soundness_flags.label: conj:eif-one-step / Q0hat_a
soundness_flags.one_line: The identification target treats Q0_a as a fixed analyst-specified center law, but the one-step conjecture treats Q0_a as a cross-fit nuisance without specifying an external sampling source or redefining the target as a functional of that source.

accepted_scope_caveats.label: ass:joint-feasible / thm:quantile-coupled-endpoint
accepted_scope_caveats.caveat: The coupled sharp endpoint is conditional on nonempty intersection of the MSM weight window and the fixed-center quantile tube on policy-relevant arms.
accepted_scope_caveats.bound_claim: The identification theorem is a sharp bound for the restricted nonempty joint class; incompatible laws yield an empty class, not a finite corrected endpoint.

accepted_scope_caveats.label: ass:regular-contact / conj:eif-one-step
accepted_scope_caveats.caveat: The EIF and root-n inference claim assumes a unique upper optimizer and stable finite-union contact face rather than deriving regularity of the optimizer.
accepted_scope_caveats.bound_claim: The inference conjecture is only for regular-contact laws; optimizer switching and support-edge contact remain directional or conservative-inference regimes.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Add a comparator-promise table mapping each named comparator to a precise statement: Hess/Frauen MSM-only endpoint reduction/tightening, Dorn-Guo quantile geometry reused but not subsumed, and deMSM or Wang/Masten-Poirier-Ren non-subsumption.

Clarify the center-law sampling convention: either make Q0_a fixed and known throughout the one-step estimator, or add an explicit external sample/model and the corresponding influence contribution for Q0hat_a.

Add MastenPoirierRen2025 and Wang2026 to related work and state why their sharp QTE/DTE or nested quantile-envelope bounds do not cover a fixed analyst-centered conditional quantile tube for offline policy value.

Strengthen Proposition 1 with a small worked two- or three-point reward distribution where Qrect_a_plus is inside all pointwise caps but not induced by any single bounded-likelihood-ratio weight satisfying the tube.

recommended_next_step: Continue revision on this angle; the core field-level quantile-tube endpoint is plausible, but the comparator audit and center-law inference convention need repair before Stage 0.
